Milky Whites is a Dairy Food Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the An Eye for An Eye update. It is dropped by the Eye of Terror. It can be used as a filler in most Crock Pot recipes.

–Winona

“Squishy!”
–Wurt
“Woby, can you find me a stick? I want to poke it.”
–Walter
“The collagen in this is great for fighting aging. Magic watch is better, though.”
–Wanda
Milky Whites is a Dairy Food Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the An Eye for An Eye update. It is dropped by the Eye of Terror. It can be used as a filler in most Crock Pot recipes.
Usage[edit | edit source]
Milky Whites can be used as a somewhat cheap universal filler, as most recipes do not disallow Dairy foods. It can also be used as a replacement for Electric Milk, as there aren't any recipes that exclusively require it. Additionally, it is required to summon the Friendly Peeper Critter at the Rock Den.
Gallery[edit | edit source]
Milky Whites concept art from Rhymes With Play #An Eye for An Eye

Tóm tắt

Sữa Trắng là một Mặt Hàng Thực Phẩm Từ Sữa độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong bản cập nhật An Eye for An Eye. Nó rơi ra từ Eye of Terror. Nó có thể được dùng làm chất độn trong hầu hết các công thức nấu Nồi Hầm.

'''Milky Whites''' is a [[Dairy]] [[Food]] [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in the ''[[An Eye for An Eye]]'' update. It is dropped by the [[Eye of Terror]]. It can be used as a filler in most [[Crock Pot]] recipes.

__NOTOC__
== {{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage ==
Milky Whites can be used as a somewhat cheap universal filler, as most recipes do not disallow Dairy foods. It can also be used as a replacement for [[Electric Milk]], as there aren't any recipes that exclusively require it. Additionally, it is required to summon the Friendly Peeper [[Critters|Critter]] at the [[Rock Den]]. {{Recipe
|item1 = Milky Whites
|item2 = Ice
|item3 = Sweetener
|item4 = Filler
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Ice Cream
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Milky Whites
|item2 = Naked Nostrils
|item3 = Kelp Fronds
|item4 = Filler
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Milkmade Hat
}} 

{{Recipe
|item1 = Milky Whites
|item2 = Bacon and Eggs
|tool = Rock Den
|result = Friendly Peeper
}}
